---
title: 'D. G. Wolfe - About'
date: '2017-01-26T01:52:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Darrell''s Idea Central (Random Idea Catalogue)'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_page_id: '8269240396116189793'
blogger_filename: '/p/darrells-about-page.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell_s Idea Central (Random Idea Catalogue)/feed.atom'
---

<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<h3>
D. G. Wolfe</h3>
<h4>
<br />My name is Darrell G. Wolfe (aka DGWolfe),</h4>
<i>Storyteller | Writer | Thinker &amp; Multipotentialite at&nbsp;<a href="http://darrellwolfe.com/">darrellwolfe.com</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a href="http://dgwolfe.weebly.com/">dgwolfe.weebly.com</a>&nbsp;</i><br />Every person has a story; something that makes them unique. Every business is owned and run by people. What is your Unique Value Proposition&nbsp;(UVP).<br /><br /><div>
Let me wri</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Experience with:</div>
<div>
<ul>
<li><b>Book Writing</b>: Fiction &amp; NonFiction</li>
<li><b>Technical Writing</b>: Policy &amp; Procedure Manuals, User Guides, Newsletters, FAQ's, Letters, Legal Releases.</li>
<li><b>Content Writing</b>: Blogs &amp; Websites, About Pages</li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
